summary: Backend-only testing complete for SmartLegal-AI. All 17 pytest cases PASSED against the external REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Covered: health, PDF upload (success + non-PDF 400 + blank-text PDF 400), list/get/delete, RAG query + history + empty-question 400, cached analyses (risks/clauses/summary) with id-equality cache verification, compare, and docx report (with and without prior analyses). Real GPT-4o calls via Emergent Universal LLM key worked end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py upload_document stores full `page_texts` and `chunks` inside the documents collection. For large PDFs this can bloat single docs beyond the 16MB BSON limit; consider splitting chunks into a separate collection.
bm25_search rebuilds the BM25 index per query from the chunks embedded in the document. That is O(N) per question and wastes CPU on long docs — cache the tokenized corpus or the BM25 instance.

_cached_analysis uses document_id+type as implicit cache key but there is no unique index on db.analyses — concurrent calls could race and create duplicate cached rows. Add a unique compound index (document_id, type) and handle DuplicateKeyError, or use find_one_and_update upsert.
compare_documents does not validate doc1_id != doc2_id and will happily compare a doc to itself; consider a 400 for that case.
download_report filename fallback to 'report' is fine, but the `officedocument` media_type + Content-Disposition are correct; however there is no per-user auth at all (documented as acceptable).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/__init__.py (new empty file did not persist; not needed since pytest uses rootdir discovery)
seed_data_creation: Tests dynamically build small multi-page NDA PDFs on the fly using reportlab (installed during this run). All created docs are deleted in teardown fixtures.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully green. Use /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py as the regression suite. reportlab is now installed for PDF generation in tests. Frontend was explicitly NOT tested in this iteration. Next testing agent should focus on UI flows (upload, chat with citations, analyses tabs, compare, download report) using the same REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.
